YODA: Dead letter queues, for messages that fail processing. Lose messages, you should not. Handle them later.

YODA: The five whys, ask them. Root cause, not symptom, fix you must.

YODA: Kubernetes, orchestrate your containers it does. Pods and services, learn their ways you must.

YODA: Feature flags, deploy separately from release they allow. Risky, big bang releases are.

YODA: Canary deployments, wise they are. Small percentage first, see if breaks it does before all users affected.

YODA: Observability, build it in from the start. Metrics, logs, and traces. The three pillars they are.

YODA: Idling connections to database, close them. Connection pool exhaustion, sneaks up on you it does.

YODA: Pagination, implement it you must. Unbounded query results, bring down databases they can.

YODA: REST or GraphQL, depends it does on your use case. No silver bullet, exists there not.

YODA: Pull requests small, make them. Easy to review, small changes are. Large PRs, reviewer pain they cause.

YODA: Infrastructure as code, manual changes resist. Reproducible and reviewed, the environment must be.

YODA: A senior engineer, not only by years measured. Judgment and restraint, marks of seniority these are.

YODA: The monolith, evil it is not inherently. Understand the tradeoffs before splitting it you do.

YODA: On-call rotation, fair it must be. Burned out engineers, poor decisions they make.

YODA: Post-mortem blameless, conduct it. Fear of blame, hides the truth. Truth, needed to prevent recurrence.

YODA: The standup meeting, daily it should be. Brief it must stay. Update, not debate. Five minutes, the goal.

YODA: N plus one queries, the silent performance killer they are. Eager load when fetching collections.

YODA: Schema migrations, backwards compatible make them. Zero downtime deployment, this enables.

YODA: Database indexes, choose wisely. Speed reads they do. Slow writes they also do. Balance, find it.

YODA: Documentation, write it while the code is fresh. Tomorrow, forgotten the context will be.

YODA: Database indexes, choose wisely. Speed reads they do. Slow writes they also do. Balance, find it.

YODA: Documentation, write it while the code is fresh. Tomorrow, forgotten the context will be.
